016package org.consensusj.bitcoin.rx.zeromq;
017
018import io.reactivex.rxjava3.core.Flowable;
019import org.bitcoinj.base.BitcoinNetwork;
020import org.bitcoinj.base.Network;
021import org.consensusj.bitcoin.json.pojo.ChainTip;
022import io.reactivex.rxjava3.disposables.Disposable;
023import org.bitcoinj.core.Block;
024import org.bitcoinj.core.Transaction;
025import org.consensusj.bitcoinj.util.BlockUtil;
026
027import java.net.URI;
028
029import static java.lang.System.out;
030
031/**
032 * Sample Bitcoin ZMQ client
033 */
034public class SampleBitcoinZmqClient {
035
036    public static void main(String[] args) {
037        Network network = BitcoinNetwork.MAINNET;
038        String rpcUser = "";
039        String rpcPassword = "";
040        URI rpcUri = URI.create("http://localhost:8332");
041
042        try (RxBitcoinZmqService client = new RxBitcoinZmqService(network, rpcUri, rpcUser, rpcPassword)) {
043            // Subscribe to Blocks
044            Disposable disposable = Flowable.fromPublisher(client.blockPublisher())
045                    .subscribe(SampleBitcoinZmqClient::onBlock, SampleBitcoinZmqClient::onError);
046
047            // Subscribe to ChainTips
048            Disposable disposable2 = Flowable.fromPublisher(client.chainTipPublisher())
049                    .subscribe(SampleBitcoinZmqClient::onChainTip, SampleBitcoinZmqClient::onError);
050
051
052            // Blocking subscribe to Transactions (so main() doesn't finish)
053            Flowable.fromPublisher(client.transactionPublisher())
054                    .blockingSubscribe(SampleBitcoinZmqClient::onTx, SampleBitcoinZmqClient::onError);
055
056            disposable.dispose();
057        }
058    }
059
060    static void onBlock(Block block) {
061        out.println("Raw block");
062        out.printf("Block version: %s\n", block.getVersion());
063        out.printf("Raw Block: %s/%s containing %s transactions\n",
064                BlockUtil.blockHeightFromCoinbase(block),
065                block.getHash(),
066                block.getTransactions().size());
067
068    }
069
070    static void onChainTip(ChainTip tip) {
071        out.printf("Chain tip: %s/%s\n", tip.getHeight(), tip.getHash());
072    }
073
074    static void onTx(Transaction tx) {
075        out.printf("Raw Tx: %s, value: %s\n",
076                tx.getTxId(),
077                tx.getOutputSum().toPlainString());
078    }
079
080    static void onError(Throwable t) {
081        out.println("Error: " + t);
082    }
083
084}
